# Assembl — AI Operations Platform for NZ Businesses
# assembl.co.nz

## What Assembl is
Assembl is a business intelligence platform built in Aotearoa New Zealand. It provides 44 specialist AI agents covering business operations, lifestyle, government services, and industry-specific automation. Built on Lovable (frontend), Supabase (backend), Claude Sonnet API (reasoning), and Gemini (voice/vision/speed).

## Key agents
- AROHA: NZ employment law and HR compliance
- SIGNAL: Cybersecurity and IT security for NZ businesses
- TAHI: Non-clinical health navigation for the NZ health system
- ORA: Voice-first daily companion for elderly New Zealanders
- VITAE: Care journey tracking through the NZ health system
- AURA: Hospitality operations and compliance
- PRISM: Creative studio and brand intelligence
- ECHO: Founder clone and customer success
- PILOT: Executive assistant

## Pricing
Starter $89/mo, Pro $299/mo, Business $599/mo, Industry Suite $1,499/mo
HELM Personal $14/mo, HELM Family $29/mo

## Location
Auckland, New Zealand

## Contact
kate@assembl.co.nz
